title: Task outcome: RAG verification subagent 02: verify contextual retrieval and chunking claims from Anthropic, Pi
summary: Verified contextual retrieval and chunking claims against Anthropic, Pinecone, and Jina official/current sources. Produced read-only source-backed claims for DinoBrain RAG implementation planning.
claim: Task outcome for dinobrain: Verified contextual retrieval and chunking claims against Anthropic, Pinecone, and Jina official/current sources. Produced read-only source-backed claims for DinoBrain RAG implementation planning.
request: RAG verification subagent 02: verify contextual retrieval and chunking claims from Anthropic, Pinecone official chunking docs, and Jina late chunking; return 4-6 claims with source URL, confidence, implication, caveats; read-only.
decisions: Use external source pages as authoritative for this verification pass rather than relying on stored anchor titles.
Treat Pinecone chunking as application-owned before upsert; Pinecone retrieval/scoring works per document/record chunk.
Treat Jina late_chunking as provider-specific embedding behavior requiring ordered same-document inputs and token-limit checks.
next_steps: If these claims are promoted into DinoBrain memory, store them as source-anchored implementation notes with caveats and source URLs.
Evaluate DinoBrain RAG with recall@k/MRR on representative queries before adopting exact chunk sizes or contextualization defaults.

evidence.snippet: Verified contextual retrieval and chunking claims against Anthropic, Pinecone, and Jina official/current sources. Produced read-only source-backed claims for DinoBrain RAG implementation planning.
